mapper.select: SELECT AVG(view_duration) FROM video_views WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND view_duration > 0

SELECT DATE(created_at) as view_date, COUNT(*) as view_count FROM video_views WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY view_date DESC
